title: Simply OneBlock
description: Just break the block, see where it takes you !
body:
# **Welcome to Simply OneBlock !**



## **What is it ?**

_Simply OneBlock is a datapack that changes the generation of your world to make you spawn on a single regenerative block. As you break the block you'll progress through 20 different phases allowing you to discover new biomes transforming the regenerative block and it's surrounding environement. Every phase will give you the opportunity to mine different blocks, get different loots, see different mobs and face different challenges._

![Image showing an exemple of what you could build in this empty world using the power of the regenerative block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd86f6c3ae87f7b28fd4f7a87df55444fce453bd_0.webp)



## **How do I install it ?**

_It's very simple, it works like any other data packs, if you're not familiar with those just follow the steps:_

- Download the .zip file
- As you create a new world in minecraft click on the top right tab "More"
- Click on "Data Packs"
- Click on the bottom left button "Open Pack Folder"
- Put the zipped file in that folder
- The pack should now appear in the "Available" list, click on the logo to put it in the "Selected" list
- Click on "Done"
- Click on create new world
- Select "Yes" on the warning screen
- Break the block !



## **How do I update it ?**

_It's very simple, just delete the old pack and replace it with the new one in your world's data_pack folder. None of your progress will be lost, but just in case, it's recommended to backup your world before updating!_

**Note for 26.2 players**

_You can update from 1.2.x version of the datapack/mod to 1.3.x version, but you can't revert back from 1.3.x to 1.2.x version, proceed with caution!_



## **I think I've encountered a bug / I have a question about the pack**

_You can contact me here: [Discord](https://discord.gg/aj2EgWhZku)_
